title: grammitis strangeana
intro: Grammitis strangeana, also known as the 'strangeana fern', is a type of epiphytic fern native to the tropical regions of Australia, specifically in the Northern Territory. This plant has been traditionally used in Indigenous Australian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Grammitis strangeana include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Grammitis strangeana typically involve drying and powdering the fronds, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or poultices.
